creator: j_guojun@lbl.gov
text:
gjin             ttyv0                     Fri Jul 27 10:24   still logged in
reboot           ~                         Fri Jul 27 10:23
gjin             ttyv0                     Thu Jul 26 15:34 - crash  (18:49)
reboot           ~                         Thu Jul 26 15:33
shutdown         ~                         Thu Jul 26 15:32
root             ttyv0                     Thu Jul 26 15:14 - shutdown  (00:17)
reboot           ~                         Thu Jul 26 15:14
shutdown         ~                         Thu Jul 26 15:12
root             ttyv0                     Thu Jul 26 15:08 - shutdown  (00:03)
reboot           ~                         Thu Jul 26 15:08
shutdown         ~                         Thu Jul 26 15:06

When power outage or other thing happened to cause machine down, the last
did not provide a correct down time when this happened. The crash line
shows the time duration when the machine is rebooted, not the machine was
crashed.

How-To-Repeat: Logon as a user and unplug the power. Wait for a hour or longer then power
on the machine, then type last command to check the timestamp.
